description: The VirtualShiftColorDriver component is used to change a color field whenever a keyboard specified has its Shift key state changed.

fields.Keyboard: The keyboard to monitor the shirt state for.
fields.ColorTarget: The field to set the color of depending on keyboard state.
fields.NormalColor: The color to set the field in ``ColorTarget`` to when ``Keyboard`` is in default state.
fields.ShiftColor: The color to set the field in ``ColorTarget`` to when ``Keyboard``'s Shift key is toggled on like capslock.
fields.HoldColor: The color to set the field in ``ColorTarget`` to when ``Keyboard``'s Shift key is being held down.

usage: Provide values for all the fields in this component in order for it to start working.
